column1: # ATT config mirror manifest — see CONFIG_SOURCES.md for the full rationale.
# Files ATT ships under usr/share/archlinux-tweak-tool/data/ that are OWNED by
# another repo. These are fetched fresh (GitHub raw, main branch) at sync time;
# the local copy must never be hand-edited — edit the source repo instead.
#   owner/repo    GitHub owner/repo to fetch from
#   path-in-repo  path within that repo (raw main branch)
# Files NOT listed here are ATT-OWNED or VENDORED — see CONFIG_SOURCES.md.
